
# foreman_organization


Foreman representation of an organization.


## Example Usage

```
# Autogenerated example with required keys
data "foreman_organization" "example" {
  name = "MyOrg"
}
```


## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

- `name` - (Required) The name of the organization.


## Attributes Reference

The following attributes are exported:

- `description` - Description of the organization.
- `name` - The name of the organization.
- `parameters` - A map of parameters that will be saved as organization parameters.
- `parent_id` - ID of the parent organization.
- `title` - Full title of the organization (includes parent hierarchy).
